sectionHeading.heading: Core capabilities that set you up for success

items.title: Agentic orchestration
items.description: Coordinate AI agents, people, workflows, and systems in real time.

items.title: Enterprise rules engine
items.description: Centrally design, test, and run all the rules that govern your business, regardless of complexity or length of the process.

items.title: Workflow & process automation
items.description: Connect the dots and transitions to streamline workflows across your organization.

items.title: Application development
items.description: Design, test, and deploy applications, forms, dashboards, and more. Low-code brings the business and IT together, and reusable components accelerate time-to-value.

items.title: Process intelligence
items.description: Map all your tasks and processes, and AI agent activities to identify, optimize, and trust every outcome.

items.title: Integrations
items.description: Hundreds of out-of-the-box connectors and a suite of integrations enable legacy and modern systems to communicate seamlessly.
